Name: DAMAGE_CTRL_PARAM
Description: Defines how an attack behaves when dealing damage, including hit reactions, guard interactions, knockback, stagger, environmental effects, vibration feedback, and distance-based damage scaling.

Fields.Name: Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Specifies the attack or damage attribute type used by this damage entry.

Fields.Name: Allow Object Destruction
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can destroy breakable world objects.

Fields.Name: Ignore Armor Attribute
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack ignores armor protection.

Fields.Name: Ignore Guard Attribute
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack ignores guard protection.

Fields.Name: Poise Negation %
Fields.Description: Percentage of the target's poise resistance ignored by the attack.

Fields.Name: Shield Damage Reduction Negation %
Fields.Description: Percentage of shield damage reduction ignored by the attack.

Fields.Name: Attack Weight Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the weight category used for hit reactions and stagger calculations.

Fields.Name: Damage Animation
Fields.Description: Animation played when the target takes damage.

Fields.Name: Death Animation
Fields.Description: Animation played when the target dies.

Fields.Name: Death Damage Animation
Fields.Description: Damage reaction animation played when the target receives a fatal hit.

Fields.Name: Instant Death Flag
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack causes immediate death.

Fields.Name: Stun Value
Fields.Description: Amount of stun buildup inflicted by the attack.

Fields.Name: Always Damages Stamina
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack always inflicts stamina damage.

Fields.Name: Hollow-Only Damage
Fields.Description: Determines whether the damage only affects hollow or undead-type targets.

Fields.Name: Knockdown Recovery Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration the target remains incapacitated after being knocked down.

Fields.Name: Knockdown Recovery Reduction Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Amount of time removed from the knockdown recovery duration.

Fields.Name: Damage Rotation Speed [deg/sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum turning speed allowed while reacting to damage.

Fields.Name: Launch Upward Velocity [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Initial upward velocity applied when the target is launched.

Fields.Name: Launch Deceleration [m/sec²]
Fields.Description: Deceleration applied to launched movement.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage Crouch Transition %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the transition time into a crouched lower-body damage state.

Fields.Name: Lower Body Damage Recovery %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the recovery time from a lower-body damage state.

Fields.Name: Guard Stiffness %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting guard stun duration.

Fields.Name: Guard Reaction Speed [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Movement speed applied during guard recoil.

Fields.Name: Guard Reaction Additive %
Fields.Description: Additional scaling factor applied to guard recoil.

Fields.Name: Guard Reaction Deceleration Speed [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Rate at which guard recoil movement slows down.

Fields.Name: Guard Reaction Deceleration Speed [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Rate at which guard recoil movement slows down.

Fields.Name: Guard Rotation Speed [deg/sec]
Fields.Description: Turning speed allowed while in guard recoil.

Fields.Name: Guard Deflection Level
Fields.Description: Specifies the guard impact or deflection strength level.

Fields.Name: Force Lower-Body Damage
Fields.Description: Forces the target into a lower-body damage reaction.

Fields.Name: Object Damage Value
Fields.Description: Damage dealt to destructible objects.

Fields.Name: Object Attack Attribute
Fields.Description: Attack attribute used specifically against objects.

Fields.Name: Camera Shake Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for the camera shake effect triggered by the attack.

Fields.Name: Controller Vibration Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for controller vibration settings triggered by the attack.

Fields.Name: Vibration Duration [sec]
Fields.Description: Length of controller or camera vibration.

Fields.Name: Vibration Falloff Start Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which vibration intensity begins to decrease.

Fields.Name: Vibration Falloff End Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance at which vibration effect fully fades out.

Fields.Name: Wind Priority
Fields.Description: Priority level of the wind effect generated by the attack.

Fields.Name: Wind Radius [m]
Fields.Description: Radius affected by the generated wind effect.

Fields.Name: Minimum Wind Speed [m/s]
Fields.Description: Minimum wind force generated by the attack.

Fields.Name: Maximum Wind Speed [m/s]
Fields.Description: Maximum wind force generated by the attack.

Fields.Name: Wind Frequency
Fields.Description: Frequency or oscillation rate of the wind effect.

Fields.Name: Wind Falloff Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which wind attenuation processing begins.

Fields.Name: Wind Lifetime Extension
Fields.Description: Additional lifetime duration for the wind effect.

Fields.Name: Wind Influence Category
Fields.Description: Category ID defining which objects or systems are affected by the wind effect.

Fields.Name: Stagger Duration
Fields.Description: Amount of time the target remains staggered.

Fields.Name: Stagger Movement %
Fields.Description: Movement speed multiplier while staggered.

Fields.Name: Stagger Rotation %
Fields.Description: Rotation speed multiplier while staggered.

Fields.Name: Disable Weight Calculation
Fields.Description: Disables weight-based hit reaction calculations.

Fields.Name: Disable Headshots
Fields.Description: Prevents the attack from triggering headshot effects or bonuses.

Fields.Name: Applies Wet Status
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack applies a wet or soaked state.

Fields.Name: Damage Impact Force Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the physical impact force category of the attack.

Fields.Name: Wet Category
Fields.Description: Category ID for the wet status effect applied by the attack.

Fields.Name: Pushback Application %
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting how much pushback force is applied.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage
Fields.Description: Amount of poise damage inflicted by the attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which damage attenuation begins.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff End Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which maximum damage attenuation is reached.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP Damage Falloff %
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier applied to HP damage after full distance attenuation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stamina Damage Falloff %
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier applied to stamina damage after full distance attenuation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Stun Falloff %
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier applied to stun buildup after full distance attenuation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Poise Damage Falloff %
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier applied to poise damage after full distance attenuation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Knockback Falloff %
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier applied to knockback distance after full distance attenuation.
